active_work.text: Takeover queue update: PR #474 is merged after fresh 3-OS CI; stale bridge wrappers #520, #522, #523, #527, #528, #530, #532, and #534 are closed as superseded by current main; #540 is closed as an unsupported failed optimizer-control slice; #473, #475, #571, #573, and #574 remain paused drafts.
